The '''Battle of Storinal''' was fought between [[Imperial Remnant]] and [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] forces for the control of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Storinal]].

==The battle==
During the battle, the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] ''[[Peremptory]]'' bombarded [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa's]] [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] ''[[Rebel Dream]]'', and it was captured along with its crew of 37,000. However, Leia herself was on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] at the time.

{{Battle-stub}}
